findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-f6x5-jh6r-wrfv in golang.org/x/crypto@0.43.0
findings.recommendation: Upgrade golang.org/x/crypto to a version that resolves GHSA-f6x5-jh6r-wrfv. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-f6x5-jh6r-wrfv for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
